title: Wildcard patterns in allowed-env not supported
symptom: The runner fails to recognize environment variables due to wildcard patterns in the allowed-env configuration.
applies_when: Configuring environment variables for n8n runners
not_this_if: All environment variables are explicitly listed in allowed-env
root_cause: The n8n runner does not support wildcard patterns in the allowed-env configuration. Each environment variable must be explicitly listed to ensure they are recognized by the runner process.
fix_steps: Update the allowed-env list in the runner configuration to explicitly include each required environment variable.
Remove any wildcard patterns from the allowed-env configuration.
agent_instruction: Explicitly list all required environment variables in the allowed-env configuration.
